name: Bank360
description_short: Community bank offering FDIC-insured deposit accounts, personal and commercial loans, investment services, and mobile banking across two Oklahoma locations.
description_long:
Bank360 is a community bank headquartered in Cordell, Oklahoma, with an additional branch in Clinton, Oklahoma. The institution operates under NMLS #488674 and maintains FDIC insurance on all deposit products. According to their website, Bank360 began as a community bank and has maintained that operational philosophy even as it has grown, positioning itself as a neighborhood banking option regardless of customer location.

Bank360 offers a comprehensive suite of financial services including deposit accounts (all FDIC-insured), personal and commercial loan products, online and mobile banking, and investment services. Their mobile app enables customers to check balances, transfer funds, deposit checks remotely, and pay bills 24/7. The bank emphasizes accessibility through both physical branch locations and digital channels, positioning itself as a bridge between small-town personalized service and big-bank convenience.

The bank distinguishes itself primarily through its community banking philosophy and dual-channel accessibility model—combining in-person service at physical locations with robust mobile and online banking capabilities. They explicitly market themselves as offering "big-bank benefits with the convenience and customer service of your small-town branch." The emphasis on having friendly, attentive staff at branch locations combined with modern mobile technology represents their core differentiator.

Bank360 serves a traditional community banking role in Oklahoma with standard product offerings. Their two physical locations limit geographic reach compared to regional or national banks, and the website provides limited specific details about loan terms, interest rates, deposit rates, or investment product specifics. For consumers seeking hands-on local banking relationships paired with digital convenience, this institution fits that niche, but prospective customers would need direct contact for detailed product pricing and terms.
services: Mobile banking app with check deposit capabilities
Online banking platform for balance checks and fund transfers
In-person banking at two physical branch locations
Customer service via phone and in-branch
pros: All deposit products are FDIC-insured, backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Mobile app enables remote check deposits, fund transfers, and bill payments 24/7
Offers both personal and commercial lending products through dedicated loan officers
Community banking philosophy with in-person staff available at physical locations
Dual-branch physical presence in Cordell and Clinton, Oklahoma for local access
Comprehensive services under one institution including deposits, loans, and investments
Online and mobile banking described as 'seamless' with no geographic restrictions
cons: Only two physical branch locations in Oklahoma, limiting accessibility for out-of-state customers
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APRs, fees, or minimum balance requirements
No detailed product specifications or comparison tools available on their website
Limited information about investment service offerings and financial advisor qualifications
No mention of digital account opening; process appears to require in-person or phone contact

contact.address: 808 N Glenn L English St, Cordell, OK 73632

best_for: Oklahoma residents in Cordell or Clinton seeking community banking with personal relationships
Customers wanting FDIC-insured deposits combined with mobile banking convenience
Small business owners needing both commercial loans and business deposit accounts
Individuals preferring to work with local bank officers for lending decisions
diagnosis: Bank360 is best for Oklahoma residents seeking traditional community banking with personal service combined with modern mobile and online access. The main caveat is that geographic reach is limited to two Oklahoma locations, and detailed product information (rates, fees, terms) is not available on their website, requiring direct customer contact for pricing decisions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 808 N Glenn L English St, Cordell, OK 73632
